summary: Clarified that the chapter begins two days after Elise's prior prison visit and gave the opening a distinct entry construction so it no longer feels like an immediate replay of the preceding prison-gate beat.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to mark the two-day gap after Elise leaves La Sante with Lucien's notebook.
Shifted the chapter entry away from the earlier prison-gate arrival scaffold while preserving the same scene, information, and tone.
